label: DCEP
notes: Used for solid-core (gas shielded) MIG welding. Plug Ground Clamp Cable into Negative (–) Socket and Wire Feed Power Cable into Positive (+) Socket. Twist cables clockwise to lock. Same DCEP polarity is used when connecting an optional Spool Gun (see page 17).

label: DCEN
notes: Used for flux-cored (gasless) self-shielded welding. Plug Ground Clamp Cable into Positive (+) Socket and Wire Feed Power Cable into Negative (–) Socket. Twist cables clockwise to lock.

label: DCEN
notes: Plug Ground Clamp Cable into Positive (+) Socket and TIG Torch Cable into Negative (–) Socket. Twist clockwise to lock. Shielding gas (100% Argon) is required; foot pedal is optional.

label: DCEP
notes: Plug Ground Clamp Cable into Negative (–) Socket and Electrode Holder Cable into Positive (+) Socket. Twist clockwise to lock. No shielding gas required. Note: some stick electrodes may require reversed (DCEN) polarity — always follow the electrode manufacturer's recommendation.
